chunks.text: 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Revision No. D - 21 of 2O2'l Date Order with Signature of Hon'ble Judge For fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.476512021 (UIA) 2. For orders on office objection at flag 'A' 3. For orders on MA No.476612021 (Ex'A) 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on MA No,4767/2A21 (SIA) 06.10.202',|' Mr. Sikander Ali Junejo Advocate for the applicant Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press the instant criminal revision application, however, states that since the trial court / Judge, Anti-Terrorism court, Naushahro Feroze has recorded the statements of the prosecution witnesses and now the matter is fixed before him for recording the statement of the accused uls 342 Cr.P.C, he will raise the point of jurisdiction before the trial Court at the time of final arguments, however, the trial court may be directed that if such point is raised the same shall be decided by the trial court afresh without being influenced of his earlier order dated 17.og.2021 passed on the application u/s 23 AnlTerrorism Act, 1997 filed by the applicant. Order accordingly. Crl: Revision stands dismissed as applications. not pressed, along with listed,m" J e\' J
